title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das argues that most AI agents are unreliable and the industry has normalized broken systems. He explains that even at 90% accuracy per step, errors compound rapidly across multi-step workflows. Das advocates for building agents that work reliably on the first try, emphasizing that taste and proof-of-work principles matter more than raw performance in the LLM era.
